last_substantive_baseline.title: Remediate PR32 evidence-quality findings
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This is the last accepted substantive repository-design baseline. It is not required to equal the current repository head after coordination-only merges.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #36 coordination-model merge commit observed before the existing-collector publication branch was opened
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is time-bounded external evidence, not a self-updating claim. Resolve current head, pull requests, and CI from live GitHub whenever the file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — repository-only existing-collector publication increment explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar
authored_change.scope: Design and statically verify a report-publication path that consumes the existing collector managed-identity principal ID without redeploying collector compute. Permitted paths are limited to the dedicated Bicep entry point, read-only planner, inactive workflow design, tests, design documentation, and project coordination records. No active workflow, Azure authentication, Azure mutation, frontend endpoint change, collector VM change, or live evidence collection is authorized.
verification_criteria: the dedicated template consumes an externally resolved collector principal ID and contains no collector VM, NIC, disk, image, or network resource
the planner performs Azure reads, ARM validation, and What-If only and contains no deployment, RBAC creation, VM Run Command, or deletion command
the inactive workflow design remains outside .github/workflows and fails closed before Azure authentication or mutation
the design defines identity, network, security, cost, deployment, validation, rollback, cleanup, and evidence boundaries
workflow-observability validation, unit tests, and Bicep lint/build pass for the exact pull-request head
the final diff remains limited to the declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the pull request draft, inspect the exact failing validation or CI job, patch only the declared paths, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not move the candidate into .github/workflows, add Azure credentials, weaken the read-only planner, or claim deployment or live-data proof.
authored_change.rollback: Close the pull request without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure rollback applies because this increment does not authenticate to Azure or perform Azure mutations.

completed_increments.title: Add fail-closed collector recovery evidence schemas
Reconcile PR34 merge and project state

resolved_repository_items.title: Define collector recovery evidence schemas
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

resolved_repository_items.title: Repair collector recovery evidence review findings
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This is the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence, not current Azure reality. The existing-collector publication design does not refresh tenant, subscription, resources, RBAC, guest health, pricing, quota, cost, report Storage state, public endpoint behavior, or live data.

pr34_evidence_quality.claim_boundary: Repository-contract acceptance only; not operational recovery proof or independent organizational approval.

authority_defaults.rule: Repository state, CI, or review never grants Azure execution authority unless a separate explicit authorization record says so.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live open pull requests at read time.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
